params.name: Im Westen nichts Neues
params.description: A novel by German writer Erich Maria Remarque, portraying the harsh reality of war through the experiences of the protagonist, Paul, and his comrades. Those who once had high hopes of serving their country and gaining honor on the battlefield gradually understand the cruelty of war after experiencing fear, death, and despair. Through the eyes of these ordinary soldiers, the author reveals the true nature of war, prompting readers to reflect on its terrible consequences and calling for humanity a …
